2023 in Legacy Fighting Alliance
Information
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
First dateJanuary 6, 2023 (2023-01-06)
Last dateDecember 15, 2023 (2023-12-15)
← 2022
2024 →

2023 is the seventh year in the history of Legacy Fighting Alliance, a mixed martial arts promotion based in the United States.[1]

List of events

[edit]
# Event Date Venue Location
1 LFA 149: Bunes vs. Horiuchi January 6, 2023 Gila River Resorts & Casinos Chandler, Arizona, U.S.

Legacy Fighting Alliance 149: Bunes vs. Horiuchi

[edit]
LFA 149: Bunes vs. Horiuchi
The poster for LFA 149: Bunes vs. Horiuchi
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 6, 2023
VenueGila River Resorts & Casinos
CityChandler, Arizona, United States

LFA 149: Bunes vs. Horiuchi was a mixed martial arts event promoted by Legacy Fighting Alliance and that took place on January 6, 2023. It aired on UFC Fight Pass.

Background

[edit]

A LFA Flyweight Championship for the vacant title between Felipe Bunes and Yuma Horiuchi headlined the event.[2]

Fight card

[edit]
Main card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Flyweight Felipe Bunes def. Yuma Horiuchi TKO (punches) 1 3:45 [a]
Bantamweight Marcus McGhee def. Luciano Ramos TKO (punches) 3 1:39
Middleweight Eric Fimbres def. Tony Charles TKO (punches) 3 1:52
Lightweight Cedric Katambwa def. Adam Garcia TKO (rib injury) 1 0:58
Catchweight (165 lbs) Princeton Jackson def. Chris Brant Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:09
Amateur bouts
Bantamweight Chance Ikei def. Shad Walters TKO (punches) 2 1:14
Women's Strawweight Grace DiFrancesco def. Kayla Reagan TKO (punches) 1 2:56
  1. ^ For the vacant LFA Flyweight Championship. Horiuchi missed weight (126.6 lbs); Only Bunes eligible to win title.
